description: Address review issues: fix temperature override sequencing, add isDangerous check in BirthChamber, document exec/eval blocklist as deliberate, and add test coverage for conversation_mode and idea_engine.
steps: Fix temperature override in prometheus_engine.cpp: move setTemperature() calls to AFTER resonate() returns
Add isDangerous check in birth_chamber.cpp before code execution in tournament()
Add comment in code_runner.cpp documenting exec/eval blocklist as deliberate security choice
Add test_conversation_mode and test_idea_engine to tests/test_main.cpp
acceptance_criteria: Temperature override is applied after resonate() so it is not overwritten
BirthChamber tournament skips execution of candidates that contain dangerous patterns
Code runner has a comment explaining exec/eval is intentionally broad
Tests for conversation_mode and idea_engine pass
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/MK_os-2/MK_OS && clang++ -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -DLINUX -o mk_os system/mk_entry.cpp -lcurl -lsqlite3 2>&1 | grep -c error
